loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD compliance and voltage quality metrics; voltage harmonics (H5, H7) are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current and voltage THD trends — per-phase harmonic order data (5th/7th) is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Displacement PF, True PF, and PF Gap — K-factor and Phase Angle are not measured for this asset.
